name: Scrambled Eggs with Cottage Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooking oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Stir the salt and pepper into the milk until well combined.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the hot pan, stirring occasionally to prevent large bubbles from forming.
4. Cook slowly, stirring gently until the eggs are just set but still creamy.
5. Mix in the cottage cheese until fully incorporated.
6. Serve immediately on slices of toast.
7. This dish pairs well with hash brown potatoes and cherry pie for a complete meal.
